invocation_body: @copilot When I try to play the game, I press the Start Game button, and the phase displayed changes to "CollectingAntes", but then nothing happens. For Kings and Lows, it should automatically collect the antes and then deal the first hand.
next_human_1_body: @copilot The "Drop or Stay?" overlay is a modal over the entire screen, hiding the player's cards. The user experience of the drop or stay should exactly match the "DrawOverlay" experience. It should be the same size, in the same position, and show the player their current hand and hand description. This overlay should have "Drop" and "Stay" buttons that make the style of the Discard button on the DrawOverlay.
next_human_2_body: @copilot The hand evaluator for Kings and Lows is not correct. It is not taking into account that all Kings and whatever is the lowest value card (and all cards of the same value in the same hand) are wild for that player. Aces can be either high or low, depending on whatever makes the best hand. I had a hand of Two-Four-Four-Queen-King, and it evaluated to "a pair of fours", but it should have been "four of a kind (fours)" because the two (low) and the King were both wild.
next_human_3_body: @copilot Currently, if there are two players, and they both stay (don't drop), and then they discard cards and get new cards, after the second player gets their cards, nothing happens. There should be a showdown and a winner declared for that hand, the pot goes to the winner, the loser matches the previous pot, and then a new hand is dealt.
